title: psoralea hallii
intro: Psoralea hallii, also known as Indian licorice or groundsel, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Psoralea hallii include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Psoralea hallii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in conjunction with other herbs to support overall health and well-being.
